description: HF transformers NF4 4-bit Qwen3-30B-A3B: device_map=auto dispatched to CPU (bitsandbytes refuses CPU offload)
HF transformers NF4 4-bit Qwen3-30B-A3B: device_map=cuda:0 OOM — BF16 materialization fills 40GB before quantizing
Baseline: Qwen3-30B-A3B Q4_K_M GGUF via llama-cpp-python GPU offload — 18.7GB VRAM used, decode 108 tok/s internal
flash_attn=True: slower (model hit max_tokens=2000, FP diff changed outputs)
GGML_CUDA_ENABLE_GRAPHS=1: no improvement, kernel launch overhead not the binding constraint
Qwen3-Coder-Next 80B Q3_K_M: architecture uses Gated DeltaNet (not supported in llama.cpp 0.3.16)
GLM-4.7-Flash Q4_K_M: slower than Qwen3 baseline (different MoE/GLM arch less optimized in llama.cpp)
